Kỳ nghỉ thú vị tại Vinpearl Landmark 81

Vinpearl Landmark 81 Khách sạn Autograph Collection đã mang đến cho chúng tôi một kỳ nghỉ thú vị và chúng tôi chắc chắn sẽ giới thiệu cho bạn bè và gia đình của mình. Khách sạn có tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp và nhân viên thân thiện. Thực sự là một khách sạn tuyệt vời với thiết kế đẹp, sạch sẽ và dịch vụ tốt nhất! Nhân viên rất thân thiện và nhiệt tình, tất cả đều nói tiếng Anh rất tốt. Cơ sở vật chất tuyệt vời. Phòng có tầm nhìn đẹp và bữa sáng tuyệt vời tại nhà hàng. Nhân viên khách sạn rất thân thiện và hướng dẫn chúng tôi đường ngắn nhất để đến bãi đậu xe. Khách sạn rất sạch sẽ và nhân viên có thái độ tốt thực sự.

Vinpearl Landmark 81 Khách sạn Autograph Collection: Sự hài lòng của khách hàng

Vinpearl Landmark 81 Khách sạn Autograph Collection là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ tại Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam. Với tổng điểm đánh giá 9.2, khách sạn này đã nhận được sự đánh giá cao từ phía khách hàng về mọi mặt, từ giá trị, tiện nghi, sạch sẽ, vị trí đến hiệu suất của nhân viên.

Một trong những điểm đáng chú ý của Vinpearl Landmark 81 Khách sạn Autograph Collection là giá trị tuyệt vời mà nó mang lại. Với điểm đánh giá 9.0 cho giá trị, khách sạn này cung cấp một trải nghiệm đáng giá cho giá tiền của bạn. Bạn sẽ được tận hưởng không chỉ các tiện nghi hiện đại và sang trọng, mà còn là dịch vụ chăm sóc khách hàng tuyệt vời từ đội ngũ nhân viên. Với mức giá hợp lý, bạn sẽ cảm thấy rằng mình đã nhận được nhiều hơn những gì bạn đã trả tiền.

Khách sạn cũng nhận được điểm đánh giá cao về tiện nghi và sạch sẽ, với tổng điểm 9.2 và 9.5 tương ứng. Với các phòng nghỉ rộng rãi, thiết kế hiện đại và trang thiết bị tiện nghi, bạn sẽ có một không gian thoải mái để thư giãn và nghỉ ngơi. Đội ngũ nhân viên cũng luôn giữ cho khách sạn sạch sẽ và gọn gàng, đảm bảo rằng mọi khách hàng đều có trải nghiệm nghỉ ngơi tuyệt vời. Với mọi tiện nghi và sự sạch sẽ, bạn sẽ cảm thấy thoải mái và hài lòng trong suốt thời gian lưu trú tại đây.

sample_comments.text: Nhân viên lễ tân dịch vụ tốt, chú ý đến khách hàng trong lúc làm thủ tục check-in, có nước trái cây, bánh ngọt và trái cây để ăn. Phòng ngủ sạch sẽ, view đẹp, câu lạc bộ lounge có đồ uống có cồn phục vụ từ 5 giờ chiều đến 8 giờ tối. Tầng 71 có trung tâm thương mại Vincom, có thể đi dạo. Bữa sáng buffet ở tầng 66 có nhiều món để chọn, hương vị ngon, xứng đáng với giá cả. Khách sạn là nơi sang trọng.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.response:
Dear teelex,

Thank you very much for sharing your detailed and wonderful feedback with us.

We are delighted to know that you had such a positive experience from the very beginning, especially with the attentive service during check-in and the welcoming refreshments. It's also a pleasure to hear that you enjoyed the cleanliness and beautiful views from your room, as well as the offerings at our Club Lounge.

We're especially glad that our breakfast buffet, along with its variety and quality, met your expectations and provided great value. Your kind words about the overall luxury experience are truly appreciated and serve as great encouragement for our team.

Thank you once again for your support. We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back to Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection for another exceptional stay.

Warm regards,
Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection
sample_comments.room_type: Club room, Panoramic, Club lounge access, Guest room, 2 Twin

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives:
Nhân viên siêu thân thiện, tinh tế, chuyên nghiệp. Luôn chào và cười tươi khi gặp khách, năng lượng rất tích cực. 
Tiện nghi phòng tuyệt vời. Bữa sáng buffet đủ đa dạng, phục vụ nhanh chóng.
sample_comments.negatives: Không có vấn đề

sample_comments.text: Vị trí có hơi xa các điểm du lịch một chút nhưng suy nghĩ lại thì nó lại nằm trong khu chung cư, nên rất an toàn khi đi lại muộn và không khí cũng yên tĩnh, thoải mái. Giá cả thì bằng một nửa khách sạn 5 sao ở Hàn Quốc nhưng về mọi mặt như cảnh quan, chất lượng và dịch vụ thì tốt hơn nhiều. Tôi rất thích và đã tận dụng các tiện ích đầy đủ. Bữa sáng buffet cũng rất tuyệt vời. Nếu có dịp quay lại Hồ Chí Minh, chắc chắn tôi sẽ ở đây lần nữa.
sample_comments.title: Tốt quá.
sample_comments.response:
Dear sehui,
Thank you so much for your detailed and kind feedback! We're thrilled to hear that you enjoyed the peaceful and secure atmosphere of our location, as well as the stunning views and high-quality service. It's wonderful to know that our facilities and breakfast buffet left such a positive impression. We're honored to have exceeded your expectations and we'd be absolutely delighted to welcome you back on your next visit to Ho Chi Minh City!
Warm regards, 
Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection
sample_comments.room_type: Club room, Sky view, Club lounge access, Guest room, 1 King

sample_comments.title: Không quay lại đây nghỉ !
sample_comments.positives: Cao tầng .
sample_comments.negatives: Hồ bơi, phòng gym.

sample_comments.text:
Nó nằm cách xa trung tâm một chút nhưng chúng tôi đã có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng cuộc sống khách sạn. Xung quanh khách sạn giống như một thị trấn nhỏ, chúng tôi đã đi mua sắm, xem thực phẩm Việt Nam tại siêu thị và có công viên ngay trước mặt, đi bộ sau bữa sáng thật dễ chịu.
Gần đó có cửa hàng sô cô la và quán cà phê nổi tiếng mà chúng tôi đã sử dụng.

Vì chuyến bay về nước của chúng tôi vào lúc nửa đêm nên chúng tôi đã được giữ hành lý cho đến chiều. Sau đó, chúng tôi được mượn một phòng tắm và cảm thấy thực sự trong trạng thái sảng khoái để đến sân bay, điều này thật sự rất biết ơn. Tôi đã quên hỏi tên nhưng một nhân viên nam đã giúp chúng tôi mang vali lớn đến taxi và tiễn chúng tôi với nụ cười, điều đó thật sự làm chúng tôi vui vẻ. Dịch vụ của khách sạn này thật sự đạt đến mức cảm động. Đây là một trải nghiệm không thể quên. Khi tôi đến thăm Việt Nam lần nữa, tôi chắc chắn sẽ sử dụng khách sạn này.

sample_comments.title: I recommend a one-night stay just for the scenery.
sample_comments.text: I have been living in Ho Chi Minh for 10 years. I went for a hotel staycation over the weekend. The reservation team and the check-in/out team are both a mess. The staff don't seem to know their duties and only get flustered when complaints are made. I've visited almost all 5-star hotels in Ho Chi Minh, but this is the first time I've encountered such a disorganized hotel. The spa is also lacking for a 5-star hotel. The price is three times that of a local luxury spa, but the service is inferior. The pool is very small, and the gym facilities are also subpar. The room was a corner club room, which was supposed to be a higher category, but it was narrow and very shabby, which surprised me. The quality of amenities is... the toothbrush is of such low quality that the bristles come out when brushing. The advantage is that the F&B team is outstanding. The food at the lounge and breakfast buffet is really delicious, and the staff in the restaurant and lounge are very well trained. Also, the view is the best in Ho Chi Minh. Finally, it's really unfortunate that a hotel with the best physical presence as the tallest building in Ho Chi Minh is being run so poorly. There are no good restaurants nearby, and tourist attractions are far away, so I wouldn't recommend it to travelers at all, but if you want to see the overall scenery of Ho Chi Minh, I would recommend staying for one night if you go.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Yoon,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. We deeply regret to hear about the challenges you experienced during your stay, particularly with our reservation and check-in teams, spa services, and room amenities. Your comments are invaluable in helping us identify areas where we can improve.

We are, however, pleased that you enjoyed the exceptional views, as well as the efforts of our F&B team. Your kind words about the lounge and breakfast buffet will surely encourage our staff to continue delivering excellent service.

We understand your concerns regarding the overall value and convenience of our location and facilities. Please rest assured that we are actively working on enhancing our guest experience to match the potential of our iconic property.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide a much improved experience.

I booked the staycation package. I emailed twice ahead for the 10 am early checkin, no answer. I called and I was told to call the day of arriving and check...whats the point?
So we decided to go normal check in time, fairly empty, we checked in, be aware they request id for young children (mine is 3). After checking in we were asked to wait for double checking the room, after 20 minutes I enquired again still wait.
Regarding the room upgrade, also part of the pack, " sorry ser, we are busy today but you have corner room" ah yes. 
Room was nice, fridge was broken, I reported it 3 times, we left still being broken.
The swimmingpool is tiny, and I mean tiny, and no children area, there are like 5 chairs for a hotel with over 200 rooms.

The restaurant for breakfast it is fine, but very busy, good coffee, the rest good if you like vietnamese food, but forget otherwise.

Staff in general are nice and try, many are hospitality students, but too much over promising and under delivering

sample_comments.title: Tolle Aussicht und Lage

Die Lage ist schön und zentral. Das Personal war sehr hilfsbereit aber nicht aufdringlich. Wir hatten einen schönen Aufenthalt und können das Hotel weiterempfehlen, finden es allerdings etwas zu teuer im Vergleich zu anderen Hotels mit vergleichbarer Aussicht und Ausstattung.

There were not much in the sense of facilities to use at the time, because of the 5K rule (social distancing). Yet the night we stayed there the restaurant was completely over booked with 'non- staying hotel guests' for a buffet meal with very load music. The staff spotted that we looked rather overwhelmed and very kindly offered to set a table up for us, outside on the terrace. The meal was not as good as what I would have expected for the price. We had a great price, because of COVID, but I'm not sure if I would choose this hotel with pre -COVID rates. They were some minor issues, like not flushing toilet, so they needed to change our room, not working TV , which they fixed straight away and a bit strange accusation that we burned the ironing board by checking out, which we didn't. Overall very nice stay, staff was attentive and carrying.

sample_comments.title: 5-Star Hotel At Its Best
sample_comments.text: This hotel is located on Landmark 81, the highest building in South East Asia. Its Executive suite is extremely posh with panoramic view of the surrounding area. In addition, you get complimentary cocktail which let you catch the evening sunset every 5-7pm. Only downside is that the room is quite close to other executive suites, which gives you a clear view of what the hotel guests of the other rooms are doing inside their room so with the curtains up and star-gazing at night seems quite impossible. Service-wise is really top notch, as I asked for a late check out since my flight is late in the evening and I was thinking maybe I can get until 1pm or 2pm, but was told I could actually late check out till 6pm. This is really 5 star service at its best.

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Luxury Hotel
sample_comments.text: This hotel opened in April 2019. Beautifully decorate and luxuries in every aspect of a 5-star hotel, high-quality furnishing. The room is clean, bedding is very comfortable, my room views on the 57th floor were spectacular day and night. The hotel starts at level 48 reception desk, the observation deck, Skyview, opened on 28 April 2019. The deck, spanning from floor 79 to floor 81 is currently Vietnam's highest observation deck. If you are not a guest at the hotel, you'll need to pay an entry fee to visit the Skyview. The rooms and throughout the hotel, facilities are fitted with touch screen technology. The staff were very friendly and helpful, all speak English very well. The food and drinks are a little pricey as expected from a high-end hotel. Would stay at this hotel again.
sample_comments.response:

Ritchie Cris Jay Plaza
Front Office Manager
Vinpearl Luxury Landmark 81

The area around the hotel felt like a small town, allowing me to shop, see Vietnamese ingredients at the supermarket, and I enjoyed pleasant walks in the park right in front of the hotel after breakfast. There were famous chocolate shops and cafes nearby that I utilized.

Since my return flight was at midnight, I was able to leave my luggage with them until the evening. Later, they lent me a shower, allowing me to go to the airport feeling refreshed, which I was very grateful for. I forgot to catch the name, but a male staff member helped carry my large suitcase to the taxi with a smile, which made me happy. The service at this hotel was impressive, making my stay unforgettable. I will definitely stay here again when I visit Vietnam.

Вы не пожалеете, если забронируете его, а еще лучше клубный номер с доступом в лаундж. Перекусы в удобное время, можно обойтись и без ужина.

sample_comments.title: Awesome Club Lounge
sample_comments.text:
Booked 2 club access rooms for myself and my son & his fiancé to enjoy the view and wind down on our last night in HCMC at the end of 2 weeks in Vietnam. 
It was a brilliant choice. Check in was easy and comfortable at the club floor reception on 71st floor. Their check in time is rather late at 3pm. My room was ready at 2.30pm but My son's room wasn't ready until 3.45pm. However, they didn't mind too much as they enjoyed time at the club lounge while waiting for the room. 
My room was corner one with 180 degree awesome view of HCMC. 
We enjoyed unusually long cocktail hour (5-8pm). Food and drinks selection were excellent and quiet as no children are allowed during cocktail hours. However, I found breakfast selection was quite average and very crowded and noisy. 
All in all it was very nice stay to enjoy our last night in HCMC.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Lydia,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed review. We're delighted that you chose our hotel to wind down after your two weeks in Vietnam, and we're thrilled to hear it was a brilliant choice for your stay.

It's great to know that you enjoyed the spectacular 180-degree views from your corner room and the extended cocktail hours with excellent food and drink options. We're also pleased that the Club Lounge provided a comfortable space for your family to relax while waiting for the room to be ready.

We do regret that breakfast did not meet your expectations due to the crowd and noise. Your feedback is valuable, and we will use it to explore ways to enhance the breakfast experience for our guests.

We're grateful for your kind words and hope to welcome you and your family back for another wonderful stay in the future!

sample_comments.title: I trusted Marriott's Bonvoy. However, it seems that the system is not applied well here yet.
sample_comments.positives:
There is nothing good about it except that it is located on a high floor.
Breakfast was nothing special compared to the price I paid.
sample_comments.negatives:
1. There was no prior notice that the swimming pool was under construction. Notified when checking in. I had no choice
2. After checking in, I was given the wrong room number so I had to wait in front of another room for over 15 minutes.
They don't even know what's wrong
Write another room number on the card key.

3. I paid extra to use the lounge, but children are not allowed between 5pm and 8PM.
There was also no prior notice at all.
If I had known, I would have never had free time.
The reason was that they refused to serve alcohol during cocktail hour.
If so, children should be banned from all restaurants.
And I don't understand why cocktail hour is held at the same time as dinner.
So, I visited early before 5 o'clock to feed the child, but was refused access because it wasn't ready yet... Not only me, but other families were also standing there dumbfounded.
Basically, I had no reason to pay this fee.
I request a refund for the lounge fee
4. Around 9 pm on Friday night, I woke up to the sound of construction. I checked and the swimming pool was under construction (this is absolutely ridiculous).
Same noise even during the day on Saturday
Complaint. After I went out, the staff came into the room and left chocolate.
This feels worse
5. The shower didn't turn off properly so I could hear the sound of water dripping all night long. Eliminate sound by wrapping it with a towel
6. The bathtub's water-blocking device is broken, so you have to turn it in and out every time, endlessly.

Why didn't you make any further complaints?
I came to rest with my family
So I chose a place away from the busy city center and I didn't want to have to deal with unnecessary emotional stress with the employees. I didn't want to ruin the mood of the trip.
But I paid $1,300 for two days and couldn't use the lounge even once.
The facilities were a mess and I couldn't imagine doing construction on a Friday night and Saturday.

sample_comments.title: Poor service and kampong attitude

sample_comments.negatives:
The swimming pool has a laughable bar service and the guy will chase you for more drinks like I am an ATM. Plus he will try to chase you out even before you finished your last drink.

I forgot some personal belongings there (very light stuff that you can put in a single envelope and complimentary post it out for a few bucks) but instead I was asked 75 USD to get it shipped to a nearby country.

Is this the treatment that you expect from the best hotel in town and when you shell out 300 USD per night in Vietnam?

sample_comments.negatives:
The lifts are beyond stupid. Form over function.

Hotels who think egg stations are a good idea need to stop it! Either have them on the buffet or to order a la carte.

I had confirmed our arrival time in advance and we arrived exactly on time. However we couldn't check in because the last people had a late check out. This surely could have been avoided with some forethought.

Service in the lounge was slow although this was addressed.

Because of these issues, and one or two more, everyone was very keen to apologies. This was a nice thought but having 5 or 6 different people come to apologies was just too much.

Its a lovely hotel with polite, attentive staff. It just needs more thought into the customer experience

sample_comments.title: Lovely room with great views
sample_comments.text:
We took advantage of the agoda offer at the time paying a very reasonable rate for the room. Our room had good views over District 2 and beyond and was clean, well-furnished and comfortable. A room overlooking the centre of the city would have been nice but you can't have everything!

The facilities were excellent; good swimming pool and gym/sauna area, and an excellent breakfast buffet the following morning. This had views over the city which was great.

The staff at the hotel were excellent. Richie personally helped us to plan our evening and make bookings for us. An added bonus was holding free entry to the ice bar on the 77th floor - a real treat!

Expect to pay above the odds for food and drink in the bars above the hotel. (48th floor) but there is a well-stocked mall below with plenty more food options.

Overall, a really good stay and we will definitely be returning when the weather is better!

sample_comments.text: It was my first visit to Ho Chi Minh City, so I was worried whether the five-star hotel would be genuine or just a name. The panorama view room, in particular, is fantastic. In terms of security, the parking lot and elevators are separate from those for general guests, which provides a sense of safety. The only issue was that the dryer socket was loose, and there were a few moments when it disconnected while I was drying my hair.

sample_comments.title: Unforgettable Luxury: A Stellar Experience at Marriott - Vinpearl Landmark 81
sample_comments.positives:
My recent stay at Marriott - Vinpearl Landmark 81 exceeded all expectations, thanks to its super helpful and courteous staff. From the moment we stepped into the hotel, the service was top-notch. The staff went above and beyond by surprising us with a complimentary room upgrade, adding an extra layer of luxury to our experience. Their genuine friendliness and eagerness to assist made us feel truly valued as guests.

The hotel's commitment to cleanliness was evident throughout our stay. The rooms were immaculate, and every amenity we could think of was provided. However, the real showstopper was the panoramic view from the 50th floor. Waking up to such a breathtaking sight each morning was a memorable experience in itself. The efficiency of the check-in and check-out processes further contributed to the overall positive impression. Moreover, the convenience of being able to leave our luggage at the hotel after checking out allowed us to make the most of our last day in the city without any hassles. Marriott - Vinpearl Landmark 81 truly made our stay exceptional, and I would wholeheartedly recommend it to fellow travelers.

sample_comments.title: 日本人向けラグジュアリーホテルです。
sample_comments.text:
ベンタイン市場やブイビエン通りまでタクシーで15分700円位のところにあるビィングループのラグジュアリーホテルです。48階がロビーでその上か客室になります。キングサイズのシングル利用朝食付きで今回24000円位でした。カタコトの英語でも通じます。いざとなったらGoogle翻訳で全く問題なしです。
アゴダからの予約であれば事前にクレジットカード決済だと思いますが、到着後、デポジットとして現金かクレジットカードで1人1万円位仮払いする必要があります。クレジットカードの場合は室内の有料ものや部屋チャージでのスパを使わなければ、チェックアウト時にマイナス決済してくれるので特に問題なしです。
48階から上の客室や75階のカフェやレストランには宿泊カードがないと上がれません。
因みに、77階のカフェは小さいですがテラスあるので外に出れます。(風が少し強いです)オリジナルドリンクは豊富でかなり良いですが、カフェの作りや雰囲気としては全く期待しないで下さいw
因みに、空港までは通常時で約20分位、タクシーで23万ドン1400円くらいです。
フライト時刻の90分前に空港に到着するようにすれば良いと思います。
因みに、チェックアウト後の荷物も遅い時間まで預かってくれるので便利なのと、ホテル前からのタクシーもきちんとした料金で行ってくれるのでGRUBなどを使う必要もありません。
因みに、1階にはユニクロや徒歩1分のところに24時間のサークルKもあるので、不自由はありません。比較的夜遅くまでやってるちょっとした飲食店も数は多くはないですがあります。
ホーチミンに来てちょっと良いホテルに泊まって見たいなぁと思う方にはオススメです。夜景はかなり綺麗ですが10分で飽きますw
朝食はビュッフェで、ベトナム料理以外に、卵料理、ハムやパテ、お粥にパンがすらっとあります。フルーツやフレッシュジュースも多くあります。中国人が少なければガヤガヤしていないので、ゆったり寛ぎながら朝食が取れます。
因みに、朝食の時間は6時半から18時までです。9時半入店がギリと思って下さい。
それとチェックアウトは12時なのでこれもゆっくり出来て良いですね～。チェックアウト後に荷物を預けて、タクシーで市街中心地に出て、買い物してからホテルに戻って空港に行くのがオススメパターンです！

secondary.description_full:
Khám phá Vinpearl Landmark 81 Khách sạn Autograph Collection - Nơi lưu giữ huyền thoại 5 sao tại Hồ Chí Minh

Vinpearl Landmark 81 Khách sạn Autograph Collection là một biểu tượng của sự xa hoa và sang trọng tại Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam. Với 223 phòng nghỉ đẳng cấp, đây là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ. Với tiện nghi và dịch vụ hàng đầu, khách sạn này sẽ đem đến cho du khách những trải nghiệm không thể nào quên.

Khách sạn Vinpearl Landmark 81 Khách sạn Autograph Collection có thời gian nhận phòng từ 03:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng đến 12:00 PM. Điều này đảm bảo rằng bạn có đủ thời gian để thư giãn và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ của mình. Với 223 phòng nghỉ, khách sạn này đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của du khách, từ phòng đơn sang trọng cho đến các suite rộng rãi và tiện nghi. Mỗi phòng đều được thiết kế sang trọng và trang bị đầy đủ tiện nghi hiện đại, đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện nghi cho khách hàng.

Đối với chính sách về trẻ em, khách sạn này không cho phép trẻ em ở miễn phí. Tuy nhiên, có thể có các khoản phụ phí áp dụng cho trẻ em. Điều này đảm bảo một không gian yên tĩnh và thư giãn cho khách hàng lớn tuổi muốn trải nghiệm một kỳ nghỉ riêng tư và bình yên. Vinpearl Landmark 81 Khách sạn Autograph Collection cam kết mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm đẳng cấp và không gian nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng tại Hồ Chí Minh, Việt Nam.

Khách sạn cũng nhận được điểm đánh giá cao về tiện nghi và sạch sẽ, với tổng điểm 9.2 và 9.5 tương ứng. Với các phòng nghỉ rộng rãi, thiết kế hiện đại và trang thiết bị tiện nghi, bạn sẽ có một không gian thoải mái để thư giãn và nghỉ ngơi. Đội ngũ nhân viên cũng luôn giữ cho khách sạn sạch sẽ và gọn gàng, đảm bảo rằng mọi khách hàng đều có trải nghiệm nghỉ ngơi tuyệt vời. Với mọi tiện nghi và sự sạch sẽ, bạn sẽ cảm thấy thoải mái và hài lòng trong suốt thời gian lưu trú tại đây.

faq.question: Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection có quán bar trong khuôn viên không?

faq.answer: Trong khi lưu trú tại Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection, hãy tận hưởng buổi tối của quý khách tại Wild Horse Saloon Bar, Quán Bar Vasco và Blue Gecko Bar và trải nghiệm cuộc sống về đêm tại đây.

faq.answer: 9.1 là điểm số trung bình của khách gia đình có trẻ nhỏ đã xác thực nghỉ tại Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection đánh giá cơ sở lưu trú này. faq.question: Vinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection có phục vụ bữa sáng không?
faq.answer: Bắt đầu ngày mới tuyệt vời với bữa sáng kiểu lục địa, và kiểu tự chọn tạiVinpearl Landmark 81, Autograph Collection.
